textByHashes.cc7af17165058f42924206d71e682297fe6fc4b8: What can I do for you young 'un?
textByHashes.25f7d9f92e0652bcec473e06356c0f1bf554d3c6: Well, what I'm struggling with right now is the meats needed for the potion to honour Guthix. I need the raw meat of four different animals for it, but not just any old meats will do.
textByHashes.eee5533602bb091a320275e8fffbd2b6aa132756: Each meat has to be dipped individually into the Cauldron of Thunder for it to work correctly.
textByHashes.e748457a3ab23064c025834ccc2af21fd9d7e6c7: It is located somewhere in the mysterious underground halls which are located somewhere in the woods just South of here. They are too dangerous for me to go myself however.
textByHashes.d87b706cbceeb4cc079c4f7865e8c558e9c214bb: Well, we all make mistakes sometimes.
textByHashes.4790338f113503e84005350c58c9688138041885: Did you bring me the required ingredients for the potion?
textByHashes.51c33e00b39e2eb959c0ecf6026641b198502eef: Well, let me know when you do young 'un.
textByHashes.d0816b6ae005cb4f4d079148a0d17cda6747a623: Trouble with your memory eh young 'un? I need the raw meats of four different animals that have been dipped into the Cauldron of Thunder so I can make my potion to honour Guthix.
textByHashes.cb62af39cde1de67e3ec210ff2728bdbb2f2a9e0: Thank you so much adventurer! These meats will allow our potion to honour Guthix to be completed, and bring one step closer to reclaiming our stone circle!
textByHashes.353d827c83112bd6d2e2a68b29b9902f9e964ee6: Now go and talk to Kaqemeex and he will introduce you to the wonderful world of herblore and potion making!
textByHashes.d429bcf834cc200137c402e6c3b4063fc291758b: 'm afraid you are not yet learned enough in the art of Herblore to be able to help me, adventurer...
textByHashes.de90ae1c06379137052499fa10d527d63b09e8be: Ah, you've come just in time. I need a certain herb for the next part of the purification ritual...
textByHashes.2a09189f4a9c6fdfd625d1d5a847556798058194: It used to be quite common, but nowadays only the trolls know where to find it. They use it in their cooking, you see. It's a very prized ingredient.
textByHashes.a1caf48370982819ed70c28d1a3302cd6060f73d: Journey to the north into the land of the trolls, and find the secret of the herb the trolls call 'goutweed'.
textByHashes.f953a9bd81b7dc4b22a43b63c7ec577d2331fa22: My friend Eadgar lives in the area, and he may be able to help you. Bring some goutweed back and I will teach you something useful.
textByHashes.8b328bad5819bb86c7cb18f6ee0b1a7d23e235eb: Oh well. No doubt some other adventurer will eventually come who can help me.
textByHashes.e55f351101c064ba8ff9c051bd5b0ea8e79e4a56: Journey to the north into the land of the trolls, and find the secret of the herb the trolls call goutweed.
textByHashes.1fbe537b3feebd8da2f58f3ae411264f54ac3f82: Now why would he need that?
textByHashes.7646f7621ec30b4a766a6eeb272b781c0fbf9296: Never mind then... I think Tegid is doing his laundry outside. You could ask him if you can borrow one of his dirty robes.
textByHashes.8a7ec3e1cb7da8275545b8b1ccedc487dea08a53: Excellent! I will be able to complete the next part of the ritual now. I will teach you a new spell and give you some of my knowledge in Herblore as a token of thanks.
textByHashes.50fb4f427e76d98309a88b75236bea533476d8fb: If you ever come across more goutweed, bring it to me; I don't need any more for the ritual, but it's still quite difficult for me to get. I'll exchange it for some other herbs.
textByHashes.be897e1933af0373256c621dea9b6f1b6e15a870: Ah, good. Here are some herbs in exchange.
textByHashes.6783acd5cfdfa5963e1ced71a4cb308a5e250137: Well, not right now I don't think young 'un. In fact, I need to make some more preparations myself for the ritual. Rest assured, if I need any more help I will ask you again.
textByHashes.6c94352ef3368616e8610b2f6ec6bb7a3de3d531: Hmm, it's quite a straight-forward process. A person, perhaps like yourself, comes along to me and asks.
textByHashes.6cc4e3f83f06bcda2a50fee441090d3a8728cb0c: We test your knowledge of Herblore and see if you can fit in with the rest of us. If you pass, then we let you become an initiate.
textByHashes.616bc7bfe10dc680d3027ebd97179af2bc3b47d8: Dwarves? Well now, that's a mighty interesting question... Just because we haven't before, doesn't mean to say that we shouldn't.
textByHashes.40132a759153e899898a57f1e91e25bc6705f84e: Oh yes? Well, that's interesting. Let me think for a moment. Hmmm... yes, actually, I don't mind taking him on, so long as you can do me just one small favour. Well, two actually.
textByHashes.438901634c00ec5ea68a456fe07b29daa66e795b: Stop interrupting me. I haven't told you about these favours!
textByHashes.2b409fe5d206722f4260800e31f3c21816b22a5f: There's a poor little gnome up on White Wolf mountain. I wondered if you could take him a warming herbal brew. I have the recipe here!
textByHashes.8e16fb10efd4c0b4d5aa8296ccf2050070a0b68c: I've long wished to take a trip down to see those ogres to the south of Yanille, and bring the word of Guthix to them. I was hoping you might organise this trip with the gnome pilot up there on White Wolf mountain.
textByHashes.69faa2308d59874ccc11df8811324a876620c526: Well, perhaps a bit... but it's never stopped you doing things for me before.
textByHashes.c3c37d4b4266a83793128807aa457f0200d313a2: Well, that's the life of an adventurer. Is it a deal, or not?
textByHashes.aba3864fa5879b70ad9bc48d0bf2345c59f9dbbd: Ok, you need to heat some water up in a bowl, then pour it into an empty teacup. Add 1 harralander, 2 guam and 1 marrentill...it'll warm that poor fellow up a treat!
textByHashes.7117f440f848420b33b33872e5daeb6697306d61: But you'll have to make another one for the gnome.
textByHashes.41951c8b6b25bf952043ba20818fc51151d109ac: Yes, but you'll have to make another one for the gnome.
textByHashes.455860142447e00b556e7a3ea55ed3366c9b0437: Well, that's a shame. I was looking forward to visiting the ogres... Perhaps someday I will.
textByHashes.5eb11242a3a71955815c38e1057e3a7a040a48e9: Make a herbal tea for the gnome and persuade him to take me to the ogre area, down to the south!
textByHashes.3f20fa5df6884b6d91b0b1ab033f34d7f4c37d54: What's that? He's agreed to take me...well that's wonderful! Many thanks.
textByHashes.2dc2b8b805d8d7ba02f07ff6c795a3299dda2753: Please tell that dwarf that he's welcome to come here and train to be an initiate.
textByHashes.c5f40e9b9e28ba7388e3f172101aac7c713d98d9: Herblore eh? You're probably best off talking to Kaqemeex about that; he's the best herblore teacher we currently have. I believe at the moment he's at out stone circle just North of here.
textByHashes.b14303fba14d4f03f27ee00ea6886f8e949340d4: Certainly. It was after all, my creation, and mine alone. If anyone should know how to make it, it should be me!
textByHashes.0fc54792675e989310e7307ef5a538f5fbbe130e: Ok, essentially this potion is a mixture of a cure poison, cure disease and restore stats all rolled into one! Very handy for the adventurers with an eye on conserving inventory space.
textByHashes.beff25530b2bd8ac41af695f736f200fc330ed70: Well, it's very easy really. You take a standard super stat restore potion. Add some ground unicorn horn. Then, add some snake weed from the island of Karamja. Finally, add some nail beast nails. You can
textByHashes.32eff3f2695bf7039ac747c48ca5b0bff5fa7f84: only get these from the area of Morytania, specifically, if you go deep in the Mort Myre swamp.
textByHashes.8fa85e863fe53da451c17a649dc3e12710d360a1: Well, most adventurers avoid the deep Mort Myre swamp, whereas the Paterdomus trek and the Burgh de Rott trek take you through the most interesting areas. These area's often allow the quickest, but potentially
textByHashes.0a1b8c2a5023535b4678413052538a9dea734005: more dangerous routes through Mort Myre. This is where you're likely to encounter a Nail beast.
textByHashes.a5983fd7f689d76b1fd91bb33d744ea7a50f9827: They can be pretty dangerous. They'll defend for a long time, then attack suddenly and seemingly without warning, landing three viscious attacks at once. This can be pretty lethal. However, the nail beasts themselves
textByHashes.14c0c4ef1e4e0411919eaa71bc4018f92197df10: are curiously wounded from the Sanfew Serum itself...very bizzare, that a potion made from their claws should have such a pronounced effect on them.
textByHashes.262e32e418b1cda289d6d0285be9e665e5a9d321: I don't need any more goutweed for the ritual, but it's still quite difficult for me to get. If you ever come across some, bring it to me; I'll exchange it for some other herbs.
